title: Replace all 'Marina Vasquez' name references with 'Susan Richten'

requirements.summary: Replace every occurrence of 'Marina Vasquez' with 'Susan Richten' across all frontend files including CMS default data, component labels, HTML title, and any hardcoded strings
acceptanceCriteria: A full-text search of the frontend source tree for 'Marina Vasquez' returns zero matches.
All locations that previously displayed 'Marina Vasquez' now display 'Susan Richten'.
No other content, logic, or styling is changed as a result of this replacement.
The Footer brand name displays 'Susan Richten'.
The HTML <title> in frontend/index.html does not contain 'Marina Vasquez'.
CMS default/sample data (artworks, testimonials, blog posts, site settings) contains no 'Marina Vasquez' references.

file_operations.description: Replace all occurrences of 'Marina Vasquez' with 'Susan Richten' in the default site settings object, including heroArtistName, siteTitle, siteTagline, and any other string fields that contain the artist name. Update sample/default data for testimonials, artworks, blog posts, and other CMS entities if they reference 'Marina Vasquez'.
Replace any default values, placeholder text, or comments containing 'Marina Vasquez' with 'Susan Richten'. Check form field defaults and any instructional text.
Replace 'Marina Vasquez' with 'Susan Richten' in the logo/wordmark display. Ensure the header brand text now shows 'Susan Richten'.
Replace 'Marina Vasquez' with 'Susan Richten' in the footer brand name display. Ensure any hardcoded artist name references in the footer now show 'Susan Richten'.
Replace 'Marina Vasquez' with 'Susan Richten' in the HTML <title> tag and any other meta tags that may contain the artist name.
Replace any hardcoded 'Marina Vasquez' references in default values, placeholder text, or comments with 'Susan Richten'.
Replace any hardcoded 'Marina Vasquez' references in default values, placeholder text, or sample data with 'Susan Richten'.
Replace any hardcoded 'Marina Vasquez' references in sample testimonial data or placeholder text with 'Susan Richten'.
Replace any hardcoded 'Marina Vasquez' references in sample press mention data or placeholder text with 'Susan Richten'.
Replace any hardcoded 'Marina Vasquez' references in the hero slideshow component, including overlaid artist name display or any default text with 'Susan Richten'.
Replace any hardcoded 'Marina Vasquez' references in the About page component, including any static text, labels, or fallback content with 'Susan Richten'.
Replace any hardcoded 'Marina Vasquez' references in the Home page component with 'Susan Richten'.
Replace any hardcoded 'Marina Vasquez' references in the Commissions page with 'Susan Richten'.
Replace any hardcoded 'Marina Vasquez' references in the Contact page with 'Susan Richten'.
Replace any hardcoded 'Marina Vasquez' references in the Gallery page with 'Susan Richten'.
Replace any hardcoded 'Marina Vasquez' references in the Testimonials page with 'Susan Richten'.
Replace any hardcoded 'Marina Vasquez' references in the ArtworkCard component, including any sample data or labels, with 'Susan Richten'.
Replace any hardcoded 'Marina Vasquez' references in sample testimonial data or default content with 'Susan Richten'.
Replace any hardcoded 'Marina Vasquez' references in sample testimonial data or default content with 'Susan Richten'.
Replace any hardcoded 'Marina Vasquez' references in placeholder text, sample data, or form labels with 'Susan Richten'.
